entities.name: CROP
entities.description: General agricultural crops mentioned in the context of nutrient response

entities.name: PHOSPHATE
entities.description: The chemical element phosphorus (P) used as a nutrient

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A type of clay-rich soil characterized by shrink-swell properties

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by a clay-enriched subsoil

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The combination of climate and soil factors affecting agriculture

entities.name: PHOSPHATE SORPTION
entities.description: The process by which phosphate ions are bound to soil particles

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Vertisols studied are located

relationships.description: Response of crops to added phosphate
Crops show less predictable responses to P on Vertisols
Crops show more predictable responses to P on Alfisols
Sorption of phosphate is attributed to low P responses in Vertisols
Phosphate is the subject of the sorption process
Vertisols are studied within the context of India
